telegram.notes: editMessageText/editMessageReplyMarkup shipped alongside inline keyboards, so a bot could update a message after a button tap. Verify the exact Bot API version against Telegram's official changelog before treating this as authoritative — do not copy this value into other documents without checking.

whatsapp.notes: The WhatsApp Business Platform has no API to edit a previously sent message; the common workaround is sending a new message and leaving the old one in place.

chatwright-ts.notes: Telegram only (TelegramCodec: editMessageText appends a new, versioned journal entry) — landed 2026-07-23. WhatsApp has no message-edit endpoint on the real platform, so neither runtime's WhatsApp codec implements this — an N/A-by-design gap, not a debt.
